scenario_description: User asks agent to add formulas to a spreadsheet, then interrupts to check system disk space, then asks to continue the spreadsheet work.

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true
DISPLAY=:1 xdotool key Escape 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; DISPLAY=:1 xdotool search --class 'soffice' windowfocus windowraise 2>/dev/null || DISPLAY=:1 wmctrl -xa 'soffice.Soffice' 2>/dev/null || true

phases.instruction: Add a Total row at the bottom of the spreadsheet with SUM formulas for each month column
Wait, before you continue - can you quickly check the disk space on the system? Run 'df -h' in a terminal and tell me how much space is left on the root partition
OK thanks. Now go back to the spreadsheet and also add an Average row below the Total row, calculating the average for each month column. Save the file.

result.command: python3 -c "import pandas as pd; df=pd.read_excel('/home/user/Desktop/SalesRep.xlsx'); c=df.iloc[:,0].astype(str).str.lower(); print('PASSED' if c.str.contains('total').any() and c.str.contains('average').any() else 'FAILED')"
